title: Basic quantum teleportation skeleton in Qiskit
prompt: Write a Qiskit circuit skeleton for basic quantum teleportation of one qubit state from Alice to Bob (3 qubits, entanglement, Bell measurement, corrections).
expected_features: modern Qiskit API (no removed execute/Aer imports)
notes: A common LLM failure mode here is using execute()/Aer imports removed in Qiskit 1.0. qcheck v0 catches that statically. Full teleportation correctness needs semantic execution (future work).
